channel.title: Buytaert on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem
channel.description: Recent content in Buytaert on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem

item.title: FAQ:
item.description:
Q: Is Dries your Brother ?
A: No he isn’t.

Q: Are you related to Dries ?
A: No we aren’t (as far as we know)

Q: Do you know Dries ?
A: Yeah .. I’ve known him since before he started his work on Drupal, now can you stop asking about Dries and refocus on me ?

Q: Are you related to Thomas Buytaert
A: No.

Q: Why are you sdog on irc ?
A: Back in my DemoScene days my nick was Sleeping Dog , whch was too long for a unix account name , sleeping didn’t feel like a good choice and neither did dog, so the abbrev became sdog

item.title: Diaper Needs Service Problem
item.description:
Last Saturday late, Sandy gave birth to our 2nd daughter
Amber, pics etc are on her own site

So we’ll be changing diapers of 2 little Buytaert kids for a while )

PS. Craig from O’ReillyGMT gets the credit for inventing the new DNS acronym,
